description_long: This is a large, industrial-style digital advertising board mounted on a robust metal framework. The main display area is a rectangular digital screen, bordered by a lattice of metal beams for structural support. On one side, there is a cylindrical metal safety cage enclosing a vertical ladder, suggesting maintenance access. The frame is constructed from dark, weathered metal, with visible bolts and truss elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The digital screen displays abstract, colorful graphics, indicating its function as an electronic billboard. The overall design is engineered for outdoor use, likely elevated above ground level for visibility.
description: A large, industrial digital advertising board with a metal truss frame, digital screen, and a side ladder cage for maintenance access.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the digital screen, the supporting truss frame, and the cylindrical ladder cage.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the depth of the frame and the structural truss elements.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the digital screen with abstract graphics and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the truss framework and the ladder cage, with minimal visibility of the screen.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding with truss support and ladder cage
attribute_frame_design: thick steel truss frame with industrial lattice structure and cylindrical ladder cage
attribute_advertisement_content: digital display with abstract, colorful graphics
